public_reputation: Known around Guildheart Hub through day-to-day work as market clerk.
manner: Thinks in queues, seals, and exchange rhythm, with patience only for those who can stay clear and orderly. In Guildheart Hub, that habit reads through the public pressures of the place rather than decorative flourish.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of market clerk in and around Guildheart Hub, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Guildheart Hub workable through the obligations of market clerk while managing the immediate pressure of legacy Mal claims, smuggling, Red Hood rumor presence.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of market clerk credible while absorbing the strain created by legacy Mal claims, smuggling, Red Hood rumor presence.

adventure_hooks.summary: Derris Ledgermere can draw the party into a locality problem centered on market clerk duties in Guildheart Hub.
Derris Ledgermere becomes useful when the party needs grounded help with legacy Mal claims, smuggling, Red Hood rumor presence around Guildheart Hub.

support_scope_notes: Created in V33_1 to ensure every locality-facing NPC access role resolves to a proper named person while remaining sparse and canon-safe.
public_signal: In public, Derris Ledgermere is immediately readable as a market clerk tied to Guildheart Hub.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Guildheart Hub: ordinary workspaces, public counters, roads, docks, shrines, workshops, or other role-relevant spaces
who_seeks_them_out: people who need access or clarity

first_impression: Derris Ledgermere presents as someone shaped by the duties of a market clerk and the daily pressures of Guildheart Hub.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a market clerk, and proof that strangers will not make Guildheart Hub harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Derris Ledgermere refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a market clerk too rigidly, protecting local reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Can explain permits, trade flow, and where ordinary disruptions have started to show.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Derris Ledgermere adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Derris Ledgermere always knows more about Guildheart Hub than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to a market clerk in Guildheart Hub.
